# David Geha — AI Consultant in Lebanon

> David Geha is an AI consultant based in Lebanon who helps businesses automate repetitive work with custom agentic AI systems.

## About
David Geha is a 4th-year Civil & Environmental Engineering student at the American University of Beirut (AUB) and runs an AI consultancy for businesses across Lebanon. He works with marketing agencies and F&B businesses to identify their repetitive, manual work and replace it with agentic AI systems that run on their own. He also designs and builds full products — UI/UX, backend, and apps.

## Services
- Lead outreach pipelines (agentic)
- Competitive research & SEO/GEO pipelines
- Image ad pipelines (GPT Image 2.0)
- Custom CRM dashboards
- Back-office workflow automation

## Stack
Supabase, Vercel, Claude Code, Claude Desktop, GitHub, GPT Image 2.0, plus custom-built CRMs and outreach systems.

## Process
1. Find the repetitive work
2. Build the agentic system
3. Automate & scale

## Contact
- Email: hello@davidgeha.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/Daveisgm05
- Website: https://davidgeha.dev
